name: BB:FalsePositive: Broadcast Address False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from the broadcast address space.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Broadcast Address False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:NetworkDefinition: Broadcast Address Space
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Broadcast Address False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:NetworkDefinition: Broadcast Address Space
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events
